name: Quanterix Corp
business: Quanterix sells proprietary instruments and related consumables worldwide to research laboratories, contract research organizations, academic institutions, and bio-pharmaceutical companies. It also provides contract research services and clinical laboratory testing services, including four Laboratory Developed Tests, through its CLIA-certified Accelerator Laboratory. The company's technologies include ultra-sensitive Simoa platforms for protein detection and spatial biology platforms for tissue analysis.

exposures.sentence: We provide contract research services and clinical laboratory testing services, including four Laboratory Developed Tests ("LDTs"), using our proprietary technology and platforms through our Accelerator Laboratory.
We sell our proprietary instruments and related consumables worldwide to research laboratories, contract research organizations, academic institutions, and bio-pharmaceutical companies.

catalysts.event: Submitted 510(k) premarket notification to FDA for multi-analyte algorithmic blood test for Alzheimer's disease
catalysts.sentence: On January 31, 2026, we submitted a 510(k) premarket notification to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration ("FDA") for our multi-analyte algorithmic blood test for Alzheimer s disease.

catalysts.event: CMS approved reimbursement rate of $897 for LucentAD Complete multiplex test
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services ("CMS") approved a reimbursement rate of $897 for our LucentAD Complete multiplex test.

catalysts.event: Launched early access program for next-generation instrument Simoa ONE
catalysts.sentence: in late 2025, we launched an early access program to our next generation instrument "Simoa ONE" to give key evaluators hands-on experience with the technology.

catalysts.event: Entered into 13 new partnerships in 2025, bringing total to 25
catalysts.sentence: We entered into 13 of these partnerships in 2025 bringing the total number of partners at the end of 2025 to 25 and intend to continue to grow this network in 2026.

catalysts.event: Goal to reduce annualized operating expenses by $85 million through additional steps in 2026
catalysts.sentence: As we complete the integration of Akoya, we expect to take additional steps in 2026 to further reduce our operating expenses, with a goal of reducing our annualized operating expenses by a total of $85.0 million.
